capture_blocks.objective: confirm AP state, UART capture path, and helper-node traffic tooling before the first L2 block
operator_instructions: Stay outside the controlled path between AP and capture node.
Keep the helper traffic nodes powered and reachable, but do not start the protected traffic yet.
Verify that the future trace files will be saved into the bundle traffic/ directory before moving to E1.
capture_blocks.scenario: technical warm-up and protected-traffic synchronization check before the loaded capture

capture_blocks.objective: collect the first long empty baseline while the same L2 load profile is active
operator_instructions: Before pressing Enter, confirm the protected-traffic generator is already running and the trace collector is recording.
Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and capture node.
Keep the room layout unchanged and avoid entering the path during the block.
capture_blocks.scenario: extended empty reference under injected protected traffic

capture_blocks.objective: capture static presence while the protected traffic remains active
operator_instructions: Keep the protected-traffic generator running continuously.
Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and capture node.
Stand almost still and do not touch the chair, AP node, table, capture node, or helper nodes.
capture_blocks.scenario: extended static presence under the same injected load

capture_blocks.objective: capture slow motion while the same L2 load profile remains active
operator_instructions: Keep the protected-traffic generator and trace collector running.
Stay within the same controlled path between AP and capture node.
Move slowly back and forth without changing the topology of the stand.
capture_blocks.scenario: extended slow motion under the same injected load

capture_blocks.objective: check the reverse transition back to empty under the same L2 load
operator_instructions: Leave the controlled path again while keeping the traffic load active.
If the helper traffic path restarts or stalls, record that explicitly in the optional note before continuing.
Keep the room layout unchanged.
capture_blocks.scenario: extended empty recovery after the first loaded motion cycle

capture_blocks.objective: provide an in-session repeat for static presence with matched load conditions
operator_instructions: Confirm the protected-traffic trace is still recording before pressing Enter.
Return to the midpoint of the controlled path and stand almost still.
Avoid unnecessary motion not required for the block.
capture_blocks.scenario: second extended static presence under the same injected load

capture_blocks.objective: provide an in-session repeat for slow motion with matched load conditions
operator_instructions: Keep the protected-traffic generator and trace collector running.
Stay within the same controlled path used in M1.
Repeat the same slow motion pattern without moving helper nodes, AP node, capture node, or cables.
capture_blocks.scenario: second extended slow motion under the same injected load

capture_blocks.objective: finish the loaded support set with a final empty reference and aligned traffic trace
operator_instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time while keeping the traffic load active until the block ends.
Stop the protected-traffic generator only after the block is finished and the capture is complete.
Export and copy the trace files into traffic/ before finalizing the bundle.
capture_blocks.scenario: final extended empty recovery under the same injected load

config.description: D04 loaded support capture on the current single-link stand for later under-load comparator analysis.
operator_notes: Loaded support capture recorded on the same physical stand as D01-D03.
Keep the primary prplOS-compatible dual-band AP node on 5 GHz / channel 36 / 20 MHz.
Recommended helper roles: one protected-traffic client through the AP and one remote server / trace collector on stable backhaul.
Keep helper traffic nodes and extra cabling outside the controlled path between AP and capture node.
Start the protected-traffic generator and trace collector after W0 and before E1, then keep the load active through E3.
This public copy does not include retained protected-traffic traces, so it must not be treated as claim-grade D04 evidence by itself.

honesty_notes: Keep the sensing topology identical to D03; the only changed axis is the injected L2 load condition.
Do not claim completed D04 if protected-traffic traces are missing or cannot be aligned with the block-event log.
Helper traffic nodes must stay outside the controlled 2.00 m path so they change load, not topology.
The published public bundle preserves the raw capture surface but does not include retained protected-traffic traces.

scripts.description: Check local WSL/Linux dependencies and capture-device visibility.
Apply the requested router radio, SSID, and AccessPoint settings.
Collect router-side snapshots over SSH or serial console.
Build the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Flash the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Capture the ESP32 serial stream for the configured duration.
Run a continuous serial capture and pause for operator confirmation between configured capture blocks.
Run preflight, AP setup, AP snapshot, and then the interactive operator-guided capture sequence.

sanitization: preserved the honest D04 limitation that protected traffic traces were not retained in the public bundle
